name: Rinko Corporation
summary: Rinko Corporation provides transportation services in Japan and internationally. The company offers port and freight transportation services, and logistic services; and engages in the warehousing, custom clearance, air cargo handling, and real estate business. It is also involved in shipping and insurance agency business, and product and machines sales business, as well as Industrial waste treatment industry, etc. The company was formerly known as Niigata Shinko Development and changed its name to Rinko Corporation in 1991. Rinko Corporation was founded in 1905 and is headquartered in Niigata, Japan.
